programme.desc: In a bid to find true love, Rigsby puts a personal advertisement in the local paper and receives an unexpected reply. Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour and Don Warrington star.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. While holidaying at the plush Bertram's Hotel in London, Miss Marple is presented with a fresh challenge to her deductive powers when the reading of a will leads to a double murder. Geraldine McEwan stars as the elderly spinster with a nose for a mystery, with guest appearances by Peter Davison, Mica Paris and Francesca Annis.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Mason and Dawson try to trace Rosie's whereabouts in Australia, and Mick becomes a suspect when they uncover evidence of domestic violence in his relationship with her. Meanwhile in Brisbane, Carol visits a monastery to find out more about her long-lost brother, but her search leads to a trap when she receives a call from someone claiming to have information. Starring Joe McFadden, Clare Wille and Lisa Kay.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank is still fuming about Chris getting married. Kim tells Frank that she is pregnant. Frank overhears Dave and Biff talking about Dave's affair with Kim.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The doctor tells Kim that Frank has suffered liver failure. Sam invites Eric to spend Christmas Day with the Dingles. Chris apologises to his unconscious father in hospital.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Josie can't take her mind off her ordeal. Jack is full of big plans on how to spend the money. Mike offers Tricia one of his flats in Crimea Street.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiona decides to move on from Steve. Ken helps Tricia move into Crimea Street so he can move into number one. Alec refuses to pass on Steve's messages to Vicky.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuthing spinster is invited to the wedding of her former housemaid Gwenda, only to be caught up in a murder mystery involving the groom's family. Geraldine McEwan stars, with Juliet Stevenson, Denis Lawson and Alison Steadman.(n)

Meanwhile in Brisbane, Carol visits a monastery to find out more about her long-lost brother, but her search leads to a trap when she receives a call from someone claiming to have information. Starring Joe McFadden, Clare Wille and Lisa Kay.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.sub-title: The Adventure of the Western Star
programme.desc: A Belgian film star arrives in London and summons her friend Poirot to unravel the mysterious threats she has been receiving, which demand the return of a priceless diamond, the Western Star. Rosalind Bennett guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The residents of Milton Cross, a feudal estate with a church, farms, houses and acres of land, depend on lord of the manor Edward Milton for their livelihoods. When local woman Sonia Woodley is stabbed to death in the churchyard two years after the death of her husband, bespoke tailor Gerald, Barnaby and Jones investigate, and the village begins to reveal its secrets. Detective drama, guest starring James Wilby, Gwyneth Strong and Karl Davies (formerly Emmerdale's Robert Sugden), with John Nettles and Jason Hughes.(n)

programme.title: Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: Vivien shocks her children by announcing she plans to sell their childhood home and go travelling with Mark. Each of the three siblings also has personal problems of their own to contend with - Helen's actions at work are beginning to have an impact on her marriage, Jake is shocked to discover that Leila might be moving on, and Natalie's affair starts to threaten her physical safety.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The badly beaten body of 18-year-old clerk Sylvia Kane is found in a pub car park by her boyfriend John Sanders. Called in to investigate, Morse finds a coded letter in her bag and sets about trying to decipher it, gradually unravelling a tangled web of hidden passion and corruption at the insurance office where she worked. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Anthony Bate, Terrence Hardiman, Jill Baker, Holly Aird and Ingrid Lacey.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A murder gives rise to rumours of a communist conspiracy. Poirot becomes the centre of attention at the Chelsea Flower Show as he views a rose named in his honour, while Hastings receives a packet of seeds that give him hay fever. Whodunit, guest starring Anne Stallybrass (Heartbeat), with David Suchet.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A dentist falls in love with his young assistant. His anxious wife, believing he has made plans to poison her and thereby remove the main obstacle to happiness, calls for Poirot's help. Drama, starring David Suchet.(n)

programme.desc: Text-based information service.(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.sub-title: Stranger at the Gates - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. A handsome man from Denmark arrives at the household in search of work, setting Mariette's heart racing with his dashing good looks, but Charley is not impressed by the visitor's charms. Drama, starring David Jason, Catherine Zeta-Jones and Philip Franks.(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: New tenant Ambrose bamboozles Rigsby by claiming to be a mystic, and soon has the other lodgers under a strange spell. Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour and Don Warrington star.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuthing spinster is invited to the wedding of her former housemaid Gwenda, only to be caught up in a murder mystery involving the groom's family. Geraldine McEwan stars, with Juliet Stevenson, Denis Lawson and Alison Steadman.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Mason and Dawson continue their search for Rosie in Australia, and after ruling out Mick as a suspect, turn their attention to a local roadhouse near to where a missing woman's car was found abandoned. The search is on for the bar owner's son when the police discover he has a criminal record. Meanwhile, Carol delivers Nev's sister's baby and is later overjoyed when long-lost brother Danny arrives in town. Starring Joe McFadden and Clare Wille.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim and Dave spend the night together in Frank's bed. Eric struggles to get into the Christmas spirit. Kathy confronts Dave about who he spent the night with.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Dave shocks Biff by telling him he loves Kim. Zak's brother Albert turns up at the Dingles. Kim tells Kathy that Dave is the father of her baby.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jack and Vera try to sell Cliff's belongings. Alec explodes when Steve asks for his blessing to marry Vicky. Alma doesn't like the idea of Deirdre being Mike's caretaker.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vicky books the wedding despite Alec's objections. Denise and Ken move into number one. Rita takes Sally and the children on holiday. Don starts divorce proceedings.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: When a business magnate, his wife and their maid are murdered, Miss Marple (Julia McKenzie) is prompted by the circumstances surrounding the incidents to recall the nursery rhyme Sing a Song of Sixpence. She discovers the victims were part of a family tainted by secrets, and as she ponders the significance of the tune, a past scandal reveals itself. Murder mystery, featuring Wendy Richard as feisty cook Mrs Crump, in her final dramatic role. Other guest stars include Prunella Scales, Matthew Macfadyen, Ralf Little, Rupert Graves and Helen Baxendale.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Mason and Dawson continue their search for Rosie in Australia, and after ruling out Mick as a suspect, turn their attention to a local roadhouse near to where a missing woman's car was found abandoned. The search is on for the bar owner's son when the police discover he has a criminal record. Meanwhile, Carol delivers Nev's sister's baby and is later overjoyed when long-lost brother Danny arrives in town. Starring Joe McFadden and Clare Wille.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A prominent bank manager is almost killed by a hit-and-run driver just before he is due to set sail on the luxury liner Queen Mary. Convinced his life is in danger, he persuades Poirot to accompany him - and his valuable shipment of liberty bonds - to New York. But the Belgian sleuth's main concern is his own terrible sea-sickness. David Suchet stars.(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The inspector and his sidekick DS Hathaway investigate the murder of a talented maths student. The prime suspect is the victim's ex-boyfriend, who is convinced his uncle has set him up, but old case papers belonging to Morse reveal the boy's family is hiding a dark secret. Laurence Fox and Rebecca Front co-star alongside Kevin Whately.(n)

programme.title: Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: The children's ongoing distrust starts to put a strain on Vivien and Mark's relationship. Meanwhile, Natalie struggles deal with her situation with Tony, and Jake turns to Stella for advice. Later, Jake unearths a darkly disturbing secret about Mark's past. Starring Francesca Annis, Imelda Staunton and Stephen Rea.(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The team need to protect the only eye-witness of a drug-running racket. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A doctor tries to lay claim to the body of a youth found dead on a building site to aid in his research, but Quincy suspects he is trying to cover up a murder.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.sub-title: A Shield for Murder - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Theo tries to prove that an imprisoned woman is innocent, but is framed for intimidating an informant to stop him getting to the truth. Geraldine Page guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An ailing diplomat asks Holmes to retrieve a document about a highly sensitive treaty between Britain and Italy, which an opportunistic thief has stolen from his desk at the Foreign Office. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett, David Burke and David Gwillim.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.sub-title: Arthur Is Dead, Long Live Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur must find a way of paying a £20,000 tax bill immediately, but fortunately Dave has a drastic solution - faking a drowning accident. Chisholm is suspicious as there is no body, while Arthur is spotted hiding out in a hotel. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 investigates a consortium building a lethal fighter plane in eastern Europe, that appears willing to kill to supress publication of the aircraft's appalling safetly record. Lynda Bellingham guest stars, with Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter stake out a dodgy garage, believed to be the base of a criminal gang. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star in the first episode of the crime-busting drama, with Ian Hendry, Brian Blessed and June Brown.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The author of a best-selling diet book is taken to task by Quincy, who suspects that his dubious advice on healthy eating has led to the death of a model at the peak of her career.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo helps a Yugoslavian princess who has come to New York disguised as a nun to recover her stolen family jewels - now in the hands of a mobster. Maria Schell guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A music teacher asks Holmes to discover the identity of a mysterious bearded cyclist who often follows at a distance as she makes her way to work. Period crime drama, guest starring Barbara Wilshere, Michael Siberry and John Castle.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur unwittingly causes a diplomatic incident by trying to strike a deal with the crew of a visiting Russian ship. Guest starring Rula Lenska, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are trained to act as bodyguards to a Middle Eastern president who is preparing to sign an important peace treaty. Meanwhile, two killers are receiving similar training to prepare them to assassinate him. As their paths cross, the CI5 operatives learn the would-be killers have some useful inside information and share more in common with them than they may have imagined.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Members of Regan's own flying squad fall under suspicion when £35,000 in cash goes missing during an operation to protect a security van. Detective drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.(n)

programme.title: Fishing Allstars
programme.desc: Dean Macey and Adam Rooney travel to Dorset with England international angler Matt Godfrey, where they target a 20lb carp on an overnight challenge, before trying their hand at sea fishing for wrasse at Portland Bill, and finally trying to catch a 5lb chub at Throop Fishery.(n)

programme.title: Giant Lobster Hunters
programme.desc: Three boats - the Triton, the Bold Contender and Ansons Bay - continue to seach for lobsters with the winter season closing in two days' time.(n)

programme.title: The Last Boy Scout (1991)
programme.desc: A private eye half-heartedly takes a job as bodyguard to a nightclub dancer. A shocking attack, however, forces him to take his duties more seriously, and before long he uncovers evidence of murder and corruption - all linked to the world of American football. Action thriller, starring Bruce Willis, Damon Wayans, Chelsea Field, Halle Berry and Noble Willingham.(n)

programme.desc: Clayne Crawford and Damon Wayans return as unlikely crime-fighting duo Martin Riggs and Roger Murtaugh. Once back in the US, they have a few people to answer to during the ongoing investigation around Flores, including Murtaugh's family. Meanwhile, Captain Avery is questioned by Internal Affairs about the integrity of his department.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A distinguished Army colonel is found dead in mysterious circumstances and the finger of suspicion points to his widow. programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Private investigator Caroline Selby seeks Arthur's help in locating eccentric recluse and inventor Albert Goddard, who has come into an inheritance. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle's country holiday with their latest girlfriends spirals into chaos when they are held hostage in a farmhouse by two gunmen who have just botched a robbery. Adventure, with Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan uses a criminal's abandoned dog as bait to lure his remorseful owner back into the country from France. Alfred Marks, Brian Glover and Brian Wilde guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi, Tom Dove and Neil Spooner visit Thailand, home to the largest carp species in the world - the Siamese carp. These fish feed differently to other varieties, meaning different tactics are required to catch them.(n)

programme.title: In the Line of Fire (1993)
programme.desc: An ageing secret service agent, tormented by his failure to save the life of John F Kennedy in 1963, is drawn into a battle of wits with a sinister CIA-trained assassin out to kill the current president. Wolfgang Petersen's thriller, starring Clint Eastwood, John Malkovich, Rene Russo and Dylan McDermott.(n)

programme.sub-title: Where Do You Go When You Have Nowhere to Go
programme.desc: A Native American desperate for work is mistaken for a burglar by a company president and ends up accidentally killing him - which only proves the first in a run of bad fortune.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A woman hires Holmes and Watson to investigate the strange death of her sister, whose enigmatic final words seemingly hold the key to the case. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett and David Burke.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry panics after putting himself in an incriminating position by leaving his fingerprints on a stolen lorry full of electrical items he has collected for Arthur. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's sanity is questioned when he becomes preoccupied with a gang of Hell's Angels and puts his life in jeopardy by taking part in a motorbike race to the death. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins.(n)

programme.title: Scarface (1983)
programme.desc: Small-time crook Tony Montana emigrates from Cuba to the US, determined to become rich and powerful. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first night in Peterborough, 39-year-old land surveyor and part-time musician Muneer hopes to win over his guests with a menu based on Pakistani recipes passed down through his family for generations. The authenticity extends beyond his food, with Muneer seating his guests on the floor of his specially dressed dining room. His guests include driving instructor Christine, hairdresser Ben, fiery Brazilian Rosie and fridge salesman Gregory. While his food receives mixed reviews, His guests discover his master plan for musical success, suffer bad jokes and find out that one of their fellow diners believes in mermaids.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: What's It Like to Catch Coronavirus?
programme.desc: The lockdown continues and people practise social distancing in an effort to avoid Covid-19. However, for those who have caught the virus - what is it actually like? With some estimates suggesting up to 80 per cent of the population may be affected, it's vital to understand how the symptoms, from mild to life-threatening, affect individuals. Here, people from all over Britain document their experiences of living with the disease. The personal stories reveal how different people respond in different ways, and how the virus impacts on people's mental and economic health.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity 5 Go Motorhoming
programme.desc: Don Warrington, Lesley Joseph, Nick Heyward, Cleo Rocos and Melvyn Hayes forego their usual creature comforts to travel through Wales in motorhomes. Heading towards the peaks of Snowdonia, the gang enjoy the freedom to take in detours and unscheduled stops, including a boat trip in New Quay and a visit to a Welsh vineyard, the village of Portmeirion and a historic mine.(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: Scotland: A Magical Journey Through the Highlands
programme.desc: Bill Nighy narrates the stories of epic train journeys through stunning scenery and natural beauty, beginning with a trip from Inverness to Edinburgh. Not long after setting out, the route passes Culloden, the site of the last pitched battle on British soil. It then enters the Cairngorms National Park, home to some of Europe's finest landscapes as well as valleys steeped in Gaelic folklore. The park's station at Aviemore is home to the Strathspey Railway, where Victorian steam locomotives come to life. There is then a climb to the highest point on Britain's railway network before the train winds its way through Fife. Eventually the route crosses the Forth Bridge before arriving in Scottish capital Edinburgh, admired for its architecture and annual arts festival. Narrated by Bill Nighy.(n)

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers pursue an out-of-control car that hurtles wildly over a major junction and crashes between two trees. When it stops, the driver and passenger, who are miraculously unharmed, turn out to be 12. Police officers in West Yorkshire investigate a rise in cloned cars, a drunken driver has a tall story to tell, and an armed response vehicle pursues a speeding car across Huddersfield.(n)

programme.title: Police: Hour of Duty

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow charts the life of Greek artist Domenicos Theotocopolous, dubbed El Greco, one of the most distinctive painters of the 16th century. His work was considered to be ahead of its time - so much so that it was all but ignored for 300 years. El Greco developed a highly individualistic style that eventually proved enormously influential, paving the way for the Baroque and providing the inspiration for 20th-century expressionism.(n)

programme.desc: The presenter meets a Hemel Hempstead couple starting a new life in a traditional Welsh farmhouse, and plan to make the 31 acres of land that come with the property work for them by building glamping pods and keeping pigs, cows, sheep and chickens. However, before they can even get started, a local case of TB threatens to derail their entire project, and a wet winter and some surprising personal news only add to the obstacles in their path.(n)

programme.title: Ian Huntley: 5 Mistakes That Caught the Killer
programme.desc: A look at the murders of schoolgirls Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman by Ian Huntley in 2002, focusing on errors made by the killer during the subsequent investigation - without which he might have walked free. Contributors include the man who put Huntley behind bars, former Detective Chief Superintendent Chris Stevenson, giving his first interview since the trial.(n)

programme.desc: A patient visits the surgery with a long list of symptoms, hoping Dr Wyne can rule out that she has had a heart attack. programme.title: Witches: A Century of Murder
programme.desc: Suzannah Lipscomb investigates the origins of the obsession for mass witch-hunts and trials that swept the British Isles during the 17th century. Travelling to Scotland and Denmark, she challenges the accepted wisdom that King James VI of Scotland, later James I of England, was responsible for stirring up the hysteria. She also tells the story of Scotland's first mass witch trial in 1590 and the infamous Pendle witch trials towards the end of his reign.(n)

programme.title: House Doctor

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow explores the life and work of 17th-century artist Peter Paul Rubens, who enjoyed an active and eventful career. He was regarded as the chief exponent of the Baroque style, merging the grace of the Italian High Renaissance with the realism and landscapes of the northern tradition, and was perhaps best known for painting voluptuous female nudes within large-scale mythological allegories.(n)

programme.title: Last Scene Alive: An Aurora Teagarden Mystery (2018)
programme.desc: When a Hollywood film crew arrives in Lawrenceton to make a movie, the film's star is found poisoned and bludgeoned to death in her dressing room. Mystery writer Robin Daniels is quickly identified as the prime suspect, but crime-solving librarian Aurora believes otherwise, not least because she and Robin have previous romantic history. Determined to prove her old flame's innocence, Aurora once again rallies the Real Murders Club to save the day. Mystery, starring Candace Cameron Bure.(n)

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The house is burgled and ransacked, prompting the girls to consider their security options. However, a panicked Rose decides to take self-preservation to a new level by buying a gun for protection.(n)

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Australian soap opera charting the latest comings and goings of the residents of Summer Bay.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Australian soap opera, charting the lives and loves of the residents of the suburb of Erinsborough.(n)

programme.title: Stalked: Julie's Story (2019)
programme.desc: A woman finds the strength within herself to recover and retaliate against her abuser who left her for dead. Thriller, starring Amber Midthunder and Brett Zimmerman.(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Candy
programme.desc: Rachel gets a dressing-down at work for dating Tag, while Monica tries to buy her neighbours' friendship by making sweets for them - but finds their appetites to be greater than her desire to be popular.(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Holiday Armadillo
programme.desc: Phoebe plans to return to her flat and tries desperately to persuade Rachel to join her, while Monica is infuriated by Chandler's inability to tip appropriately. Ross looks after Ben during the holiday season, and dresses as an armadillo to keep him entertained.(n)

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Australian soap opera, charting the lives and loves of the residents of the suburb of Erinsborough.(n)

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity 5 Go Motorhoming
programme.desc: Lesley Joseph, Don Warrington, Melvyn Hayes, Nick Heyward and Cleo Rocos's final leg of their journey sees them reach the Isle of Skye - or as the Vikings called it, the Cloudy Isle. It certainly lives up to its name, as the weather crosses swords with the wandering stars. Melvyn and Nick Heyward bond over a cup of tea and an impromptu jam sees their relationship cemented. Meanwhile, Lesley, Cleo and Don go in search of the island's beauty spots. However, the three travellers seem to take more pleasure from one another's company than the various sights.(n)

programme.title: Sewermen
programme.desc: A team of specialist divers in the Irish Sea are on an underwater mission to clean out a massive submerged outfall pipe which disperses treated waste water deep into the sea. A collapsed sewer threatens a town's first public food fayre.(n)

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: A patient awaiting knee surgery suffers acute abdominal pain, which combined with her underlying heart condition, leaves her fearful for her life expectancy. A woman having a diabetes review confesses to having over-indulged, a young man comes in suffering from memory loss, and a distressed youngster is unable to describe his own symptoms.(n)

programme.title: Casualty 24/7
programme.desc: The hospital struggles with a huge backlog of untreated patients from the night shift, as staff have a hard time ensuring that everyone is discharged or admitted within four hours of arrival. An 85-year-old motorist is treated for a severe head injury after skidding on ice, her car ending up on its roof. A woman who tripped while shopping fears that a broken ankle will jeopardise her plans to go on a cruise.(n)

programme.title: And Proud
programme.desc: Documentary about petty thieves making a living by picking pockets and snatching valuables in the street, including 34-year-old Rob Nightingale, who has been active for the past five years and claims he has stolen valuables worth around £100,000 in the space of 12 months. The film also shows Romanian gangs operating in Liverpool and London and learns the tricks of their trade, as well as following the money back to their home country to discover what the ill-gotten gains are spent on.(n)

programme.title: Big Body Squad
programme.desc: The Big Body Squad come to the aid of plus-sized people trapped in their homes, including 40 stone woman Brenda Flanagan-Davies, who needs help moving house. Elsewhere, the team attend at a car crash, where a 30 stone driver has become trapped. Wedged behind the steering wheel, it is a race against the clock for them to try and get him free.(n)

programme.title: Moonrise (1948)
programme.desc: A man is haunted by the fact that his late father was a murderer, something no-one will ever let him forget. His problems are further compounded when he accidentally kills a man in self-defence - and realising people will think it was malicious, he decides to hide the body. Drama, starring Dane Clark, Gail Russell and Ethel Barrymore.(n)

programme.title: The Return of the Pink Panther (1975)
programme.desc: The inept Inspector Clouseau sets out to unmask a notorious international jewel thief believed to be behind the theft of a priceless diamond - but anarchy, as ever, follows wherever he goes. Blake Edwards' comedy sequel, starring Peter Sellers, Christopher Plummer, Catherine Schell, Herbert Lom, Burt Kwouk and Graham Stark.(n)

programme.title: The Ladykillers (1955)
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind and his gang come up with a cunning scheme to steal a fortune, but their plan is threatened by the unsuspecting elderly landlady of the boarding house they are staying in. They decide to dispose of her, which proves easier said than done. Classic Ealing comedy, with Alec Guinness, Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Katie Johnson, Cecil Parker, Danny Green and Jack Warner.(n)

programme.title: The Two Faces of January (2014)
programme.desc: A conman masquerades as a tour guide in Greece, and selects a wealthy American tourist and his younger wife as likely targets. However, when a murder is committed at the couple's hotel, all three are incriminated, and a dangerous alliance develops. Thriller based on Patricia Highsmith's novel, starring Viggo Mortensen, Kirsten Dunst and Oscar Isaac.(n)

programme.title: Footloose (2011)
programme.desc: A teenager from Boston moves to a small conservative town, and discovers the council and a preacher have enforced a ban on loud music and dancing. He openly defies the harsh rules, revitalising the local youth and winning the heart of the reverend's daughter. Remake of the 1984 drama, with Kenny Wormald, Julianne Hough and Dennis Quaid.(n)

programme.title: Hidden Figures (2016)
programme.desc: As the space race reaches fever pitch in the early 1960s, a trio of female African-American mathematicians attempt to overcome prejudice and find work with NASA. Their remarkable skills prove vital in getting an astronaut into orbit and bringing him safely back to Earth, but to realise their potential they must overcome deep-seated prejudice in the space programme and society as a whole. Fact-based drama, starring Taraji P Henson, Octavia Spencer, Janelle Monae and Kevin Costner.(n)

programme.title: Criminal (2016)
programme.desc: A deceased CIA agent's secrets, skills and memories are implanted into a death-row inmate in the hope that he will complete an operative's crucial mission. Thriller, starring Kevin Costner, Ryan Reynolds, Gary Oldman and Gal Gadot.(n)

programme.title: Bad Neighbours (2014)
programme.desc: A couple living in suburbia and adjusting to new parenthood are determined to prove they can still be cool when a household of students moves in next door. However, when their raucous neighbours' wild parties disrupt their lives, they decide to fight back, leading to a vicious cycle of one-upmanship. Comedy, starring Seth Rogen, Zac Efron and Rose Byrne.(n)

programme.title: The Turning Point (1952)
programme.desc: A journalist helps a crusading district attorney who has been given the task of cracking down on a crime syndicate, but the pair's efforts are hampered by political corruption. Film noir, starring William Holden, Edmond O'Brien and Alexis Smith.(n)

programme.title: The Pink Panther Strikes Again (1976)
programme.desc: Inspector Clouseau fends off a murder syndicate led by his former police chief Dreyfus, who has been driven insane by his hatred for the bungling detective. However, doing away with the lucky lawman proves harder than anticipated - even for the world's best assassins. Comedy sequel, starring Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Lesley-Anne Down, Burt Kwouk and Leonard Rossiter.(n)

programme.title: The League of Gentlemen (1960)
programme.desc: A former Army colonel, angry at his enforced retirement, sets out to exact an elaborate revenge on society in general. Recruiting seven other former servicemen who have turned to a life of crime, he plans a major bank robbery with military precision. Crime caper, starring Jack Hawkins, Nigel Patrick, Richard Attenborough, Roger Livesey and Bryan Forbes.(n)

programme.title: The Harry Hill Movie (2013)
programme.desc: The quirky comedian is tricked into thinking his hamster has only one week to live, so he and his nan decide to grant the pet's dying wish of a holiday in Blackpool. However, they do not realise they have fallen into a trap set by Harry's evil twin brother. Comedy, starring Harry Hill, Julie Walters, Matt Lucas and Sheridan Smith.(n)

programme.title: Now You See Me (2013)
programme.desc: Four magicians use their lavish stage shows as cover for a series of seemingly impossible heists, and give away the money they steal to their audiences. An FBI agent assembles a team of experts to discover how the baffling robberies are committed and what the secret agenda behind the crime spree is. Crime thriller, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Woody Harrelson and Isla Fisher.(n)

programme.title: Birth of the Dragon (2016)
programme.desc: An aspiring martial artist trains under a young Bruce Lee in 1960s San Francisco, and is drawn into a showdown between his mentor and renowned Shaolin master Wong Jack Man. Martial arts biopic, starring Philip Ng, Billy Magnussen and Yu Xia.(n)

programme.title: Warrior (2011)
programme.desc: Two estranged brothers are drawn to enter a mixed martial arts tournament, one a military veteran looking for a way to escape his troubled past, the other a struggling teacher who needs the prize money to support his family. As they progress through the contest, both emerge as likely winners - putting them on course to face each other in the final. Drama, with Joel Edgerton, Tom Hardy and Nick Nolte.(n)

programme.title: Beauty and the Dogs (2017)
programme.desc: Mariam is subjected to a horrific night of rape and sexual abuse by police officers. She is treated with suspicion and contempt by medical staff when she reports what has happened and is met with hostility by the police. Thwarted at every turn by the institutions that should be protecting her, can Mariam find any sort of justice for what's happened to her? Tunisian crime thriller, starring Mariam Al Ferjani. In Arabic.(n)

programme.title: The Return of the Musketeers (1989)
programme.desc: D'Artagnan reunites his former companions to save the queen of France from the scheming Cardinal Mazarin, and embark on a mission to England to prevent the beheading of Charles I. Meanwhile, the daughter of a former vanquished enemy is seeking revenge on the four heroes. Swashbuckling adventure sequel, with Oliver Reed, Michael York, Frank Finlay, Richard Chamberlain, Kim Cattrall and Roy Kinnear, who died during filming.(n)

programme.title: Carry On Sergeant (1958)
programme.desc: A military sergeant approaching retirement hopes to end his career on a high note by seeing his last lot of recruits come first in an annual competition to find the best squad in the forces. However, he is not prepared for the hopeless band of misfits placed under his command. The first in the comedy series, starring William Hartnell and Bob Monkhouse.(n)

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter (1964)
programme.desc: A Civil War veteran returns home to find a ruthless landowner has sold the family house and his land has been confiscated as so-called enemy property. When the soldier retaliates by breaking into his former home and barricading himself in, the land baron hires a mysterious gunslinger to force the rebel out - but once unleashed, the hired gun has ideas of his own. Western, starring Yul Brynner, George Segal, Janice Rule and Pat Hingle.(n)

programme.title: Akeelah and the Bee (2006)
programme.desc: A clever girl from a poor neighbourhood finds school frustrating and tries to hide her intelligence from her classmates. When she competes in a spelling competition, she is surprised to win and with the aid of a strict coach, sets out to take part in a national tournament and provide her community with something to rally round. Drama, starring Keke Palmer, Laurence Fishburne and Angela Bassett.(n)

programme.title: Risen (2016)
programme.desc: A Roman officer and his assistant are charged with investigating what became of Jesus' body following the crucifixion, as the Roman hierarchy fears stories of a resurrected Messiah may lead to an uprising in Jerusalem. However, what they discover during their search forces them to question everything they believe. Biblical drama, starring Joseph Fiennes and Tom Felton.(n)

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter (2015)
programme.desc: A medieval warrior thwarts an evil witch queen's plan to wipe out the human race, but is cursed with immortality as a result. In the modern day, he continues to battle evil, and faces his greatest challenge when the sorceress is resurrected to resume her evil plan. Fantasy adventure, starring Vin Diesel, Elijah Wood, Rose Leslie and Michael Caine.(n)

programme.title: Nowhere Boy (2009)
programme.desc: Biopic chronicling John Lennon's teenage years, examining his troubled family life, as he is torn between the aunt who raised him and his estranged mother, who encourages his creative side. As he becomes fascinated with the rise of rock 'n' roll, he finds a kindred spirit in a young Paul McCartney. Starring Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Kristin Scott Thomas, Anne-Marie Duff and Thomas Sangster.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney tries to help Ted find a date when he breaks up with Jeanette by using his infamous book of chat-up lines. However, Robin is furious when she discovers he lied to her about destroying it. Meanwhile, Marshall accidentally draws attention to himself at an art gallery opening where Lily hoped to make a good impression.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin tells Barney she wants to begin their married life in a new home as she feels uncomfortable living in a flat where so many women have been before her. However, Barney is reluctant to sell his bachelor pad and starts to drive away prospective buyers. Meanwhile, Lily's demanding new job working for The Captain (Kyle MacLachlan) as an art consultant begins to take its toll on her relationship with Marshall.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Ryder and Mel come to an agreement, and Joe offers his help after Mel's attempt to teach Lennox how to drive does not go down well. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox tries to get out of gym class, leading her teacher to make wild assumptions, and Mel is anxious when her mother comes to visit. Meanwhile, Joe tries to smooth over the troubled relationship between the two women. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike grows concerned about how Molly is spending her leisure time between novels, and tries to push her into becoming the perfect home-maker. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell.(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike brings home a stray puppy for the weekend, but when Molly has difficulty bonding with the pooch, she begins to doubt her maternal skills. Comedy, starring Melissa McCarthy.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's old adversary Wil Wheaton returns and invites everyone to a house-warming party. Leonard is eager to go, but Sheldon threatens to shun him if he attends. However, he soon changes his mind when he finds out that Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Brent Spiner will also be there.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's mother comes to visit and woos the gang, but he cannot help feeling jealous of all the attention she is receiving - until a bout of illness lays him low, and he suddenly sees the benefits of having her around. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Mr Meller singles out Adam during dodgeball, Beverly intervenes and gets him fired. Soon after, Murray and Adam see Meller in a new light, so Beverly tries to get his job back for him. Meanwhile, Barry can't accept that Erica is better than him at a new board game - Trivial Pursuit.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly challenges Erica to participate in Jazzercise after she claims her mother's obsession is 'sad'. However, when she wins the bet, Erica opts out of celebrating Thanksgiving so Beverly has to find a way to win her daughter back to the celebrations. Uncle Marvin visits and unexpectedly bonds with Adam. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta invites his newly discovered half-sister Kate (New Girl star Nasim Pedrad) to come and stay with him in New York. However, when he and Santiago realise she's a bit of a nightmare, they must find a way to get her back home to Dallas as fast as possible.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When a fire destroys Boyle's food truck, Pimento unexpectedly shows up at the scene, working as an insurance investigator. Diaz helps Santiago to see that it's fine to get excited about picking her wedding dress, while Gina and Jeffords coach Captain Holt in the art of social media. Comedy, starring Joe Lo Truglio and Jason Mantzoukas.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the middle of a nationwide shortage of liquid helium, Sheldon and Leonard take desperate measures to obtain the supplies they need in order to prove a scientific theory before a rival team of researchers can beat them to it. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette download a dating app onto Amy's phone in order to find her a new boyfriend.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While being interviewed for a documentary about Star Trek character Mr Spock, Sheldon struggles to suppress his emotions about his recent break-up with Amy, leaving Leonard and Penny shocked to discover he had bought her an engagement ring. Howard and Bernadette fall out over plans to renovate his childhood home. Wil Wheaton, Adam Nimoy and Stephen Merchant guest star.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe accidentally injures Austin during a game of pool, foiling his plan for a romantic weekend away with Mel. Meanwhile, a home-schooled student begins studying with Ryder, but the new arrangement soon turns sour.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Austin have different opinions about whether or not to have children, while Joe is confused when his new girlfriend tell him that she only wants a physical relationship with no other commitments. Plus, Lennox enlists Ryder's help when she struggles to write her college admissions essay. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the comedy following the exploits of young man Ben, whose life is turned upside down when he finds a baby girl has been left on his doorstep by an ex-girlfriend - and decides to raise his infant daughter with help from his friends and family. Jean-Luc Bilodeau stars.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben feels guilty about leaving Emma at home when he heads out on a date, and can only think about his little girl. Meanwhile, Bonnie tries to take over care of the child, believing the men are not responsible enough, leaving Riley to persuade her otherwise.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jeffords believes the Pontiac Bandit is up to his old tricks and stealing cars again, but Peralta is convinced he's wrong and attempts to prove it. The rest of the squad battles to keep Shaw's bar a police hangout after some firefighters stake their claim to it.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz work and rework a crime scene in their efforts to solve a difficult murder case that is clouded by confusing evidence. However, their sympathy for the mourning mother of the victim leads them to make unrealistic promises to her.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray takes Adam to a Phillies baseball game and allows him to leave his seat on his own for the first time, only to find Adam immediately gets lost in the stadium. Beverly accompanies Erica and Barry on a shopping trip - but they begin arguing on the way home.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica decides to put college on hold and pursue her dream of becoming a pop singer - which causes her parents no end of stress. Meanwhile, an April Fools' Day prank leads to an all-out war between Adam and Barry. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey, Jeff Garlin and Hayley Orrantia.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the friends find out about Bernadette's big news, they celebrate by getting together for an evening of karaoke. However, Bernadette is upset when Howard freaks out over her announcement as he becomes convinced that he needs to start earning more money. Comedy, Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the 200th episode of the comedy, the gang finally celebrates Sheldon's birthday after more than nine years together, with the help of a few special guests. Starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with guest appearances from Adam West, Wil Wheaton and Stephen Hawking.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam recruits Marcy to put Andi's stuck-up sister Kelly in her place when she comes for a visit. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc.(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in and around Cambridge compete for the cash prize of £1,000, with Fiona and Anthony kicking off proceedings, followed by Paul and Karen, and Ari and Amanda.(n)

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Jamie Laing, Alex Mytton and Sam Thompson get together online to revisit a classic episode and reflect on some of their biggest dating disasters and scandals from years gone by. As rumours of Alex's infidelity reach a distraught Binky, and with more lies yet to come, a dramatic confrontation is inevitable. Meanwhile, Sam thinks he's met the girl of his dreams in Christiana - until he introduces her to Spencer.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity First Dates
programme.desc: TV presenter Esther Rantzen has found life lonely since the death of her husband Desmond Wilcox in 2000, but is worried her formidable reputation can scare men off. She participates in this celebrity version of the show in which singletons meet up with potential partners at a restaurant. Also appearing on this first edition are actor Richard Blackwood (aka EastEnders bad boy Vincent), The Only Way Is Essex reality TV star Jess Wright and 2012 Paralympics table tennis silver medallist Will Bayley.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. They then they whittle the candidates down until only one remains. In the first edition, Aina, a music producer from London, wants to find someone adventurous who she can have a deeper connection with, while Guildford-based designer Mal - who has dated men and women - is curious to see who she will be drawn to when all options are laid bare before her.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang goes to a bar and runs into Penny's old boyfriend Zack, while Bernadette is left to spend the evening with Sheldon when she cannot go wine tasting with the others. Elsewhere, things do not go to plan when Raj introduces his new girlfriend, Claire. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon discovers a surprise screening of The Avengers is scheduled at a local cinema, complete with a Q&A session with the film's director, Joss Whedon. However, the event just happens to clash with time he'd planned to spend with Amy, so he decides to pay Stuart to be his subtitute for the afternoon while he and the other boys immerse themselves in Marvel superheroics. Meanwhile, Leonard's mother Beverly arrives in town for an extended visit, and Penny takes the opportunity to bond with her new mother-in-law - and to make up for not inviting her to the wedding. Comedy, guest starring Christine Baranski.(n)

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Some of the friends go to Dubai to celebrate Louise's birthday, but she struggles to resist Spencer's flirtatious advances with Jamie stuck in England. Hugo introduces Natalie to his father, hoping to get his seal of approval, and back in the UK, Richard and Gabriella brainstorm song ideas for a business advert.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week. Under scrutiny this week are BBC drama series Doctor Foster, classical music feast the Last Night of the Proms, Shane Meadows' mini-series This Is England '90, singing showcase The X Factor, Britain's Biggest Adventures with Bear Grylls and hook-up show First Dates. Narrated by Caroline Aherne. First aired in September 2015.(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Mula, 23, was stood up on her last visit to the restaurant, and she's hoping round two will be better. Funnyman AJ, also returning, tries to seduce her with his best jokes. Could it be second time lucky? Geordie postie Jodie is back after being 'friend-zoned' last week, and she's pleasantly surprised by Irish beauty Louise. Tom is a suave, confident restaurateur looking for a refined lady, but dance teacher Alliee isn't immediately impressed by his well-rehearsed advances, including petrol-station flowers and champagne.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's old adversary Wil Wheaton returns and invites everyone to a house-warming party. Leonard is eager to go, but Sheldon threatens to shun him if he attends. However, he soon changes his mind when he finds out that Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Brent Spiner will also be there.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's mother comes to visit and woos the gang, but he cannot help feeling jealous of all the attention she is receiving - until a bout of illness lays him low, and he suddenly sees the benefits of having her around. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney tries to help Ted find a date when he breaks up with Jeanette by using his infamous book of chat-up lines. However, Robin is furious when she discovers he lied to her about destroying it. Meanwhile, Marshall accidentally draws attention to himself at an art gallery opening where Lily hoped to make a good impression.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin tells Barney she wants to begin their married life in a new home as she feels uncomfortable living in a flat where so many women have been before her. However, Barney is reluctant to sell his bachelor pad and starts to drive away prospective buyers. Meanwhile, Lily's demanding new job working for The Captain (Kyle MacLachlan) as an art consultant begins to take its toll on her relationship with Marshall.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

Meanwhile, Marshall challenges Robin to a dance-off when they fall out over who should take the credit for a new cocktail invented at McLaren's bar.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: The Captain asks Lily to move to Rome for a year so she can continue to act as his consultant while he lives there, but she is afraid Marshall will feel resentful toward her if she accepts. Meanwhile, Ted and Barney are captivated by the idea of seeing a woman's figure as it is always hidden beneath a large coat. American sitcom, guest starring Kyle MacLachlan.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox starts an internship at Mel's office and immediately hits it off with someone who happens to work for her biggest political rival, which leads to an accusation of disloyalty. Elsewhere, Joe finally finds a new job in the financial industry, which entails working overnight as an online consultant for a Russian company.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel is annoyed when Joe's Russian girlfriend Elena comes to visit and begins to monopolise his time. Meanwhile, Ryder volunteers to help Lennox with an experiment that requires him to eat only vending machine food, but he soon comes to regret his generous offer.(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.sub-title: The Wreck of the Vincent Moranto
programme.desc: Vince sells the boat that he and Mike were remodelling together, causing Mike to revisit memories of empty promises made by his father. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell.(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Fate presents Molly with an opportunity after she finds one of her former fourth-grade students homeless and pregnant.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard has doubts about his feelings for Priya when he kisses a girl he meets in the comic-book store, while the rest of the friends play pranks on Sheldon in celebration of Halloween. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is hurt to discover Penny and Bernadette went shopping for bridesmaid dresses without her. She first turns to a reluctant Sheldon for comfort and later tries to drown her sorrows. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam breaks his arm and tells his school friends he fell off a hoverboard like the hero in Back to the Future, but the lie threatens his friendship with Emmy Mirsky. Meanwhile, Beverly fears she's being replaced in the kitchen when the family falls in love with the new Chinese restaurant in town. An 11-year old boy captures his family on his video camera as they grow up in the 1980s. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: The Most Handsome Boy on the Planet
programme.desc: Barry is excited when a modelling agency representative approaches him, but Erica thinks it's a scam. Meanwhile, Adam tries to get Murray to build bridges with his father.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle organises an elaborate scavenger hunt for Peralta's bachelor party, but the guys take some short cuts that throw the event into disarray. Santiago's bachelorette party goes awry when it comes to light that she once slept with a member of the band that is to play at her wedding reception.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members worry about Diaz when she responds to an active shooter alert, but are instructed to stay back at the precinct building and are powerless to help. Peralta and Boyle try to find ways to assist Diaz, Jeffords has an existential crisis, while Santiago and Gina attempt to repair the broken toilet in the ladies' room.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy has a date with a mystery man, so Sheldon asks Howard and Raj to help him find a new girlfriend online. When Amy is coy with the details about the guy she's dating, Penny and Bernadette decide to spy on them. Stephen Merchant guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try hanging out as friends when they spend Thanksgiving together at the aquarium. Howard reluctantly agrees to volunteer at a soup kitchen with Bernadette, Raj and Emily. Meanwhile, Penny discovers that Leonard knows more about her than she thought.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Ryder is upset when he discovers his friends have deleted him from their profiles on social media websites, and Lennox is determined to beat Zander's test scores. Meanwhile, Joe begins to date Mel's high-maintenance friend Anita (Shannon Elizabeth). Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel desperately tries to act like a cool aunt after discovering that Lennox and Zander have taken their relationship to the next level, but Joe just wants to kill the boyfriend. Meanwhile, Ryder's girlfriend Keira is impressed by his undeserved bad boy reputation, but her parents are not. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Tucker take baby Emma for a doctor's appointment, and Ben decides to ask a nurse at the surgery out on a date. Danny prepares for his first hockey game with the New York Rangers, and his superstitious rituals include carrying an old high-school jersey that has never been washed to the event. However, things go wrong when Tucker accidentally launders the lucky jersey. Comedy, starring Derek Theler.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: The guys appreciate Bonnie's help, but struggle to cope when she begins to turn up at the flat unexpectedly. Ben and Danny decide to take baby Emma over to Riley's place, but end up sabotaging her latest date. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Captain Holt clash over the merits of Holt's newly hired assistant. Jeffords, Santiago, Diaz and Boyle attempt to do something about the cluttered and dirty communal office space at the 99th precinct.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago investigate a difficult 'he said, she said' case. Captain Holt becomes suspicious that a cunning escape from jail has taken place after discovering that his lifelong criminal arch-nemesis has died in a prison transport accident.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam has a birthday sleepover, during which his friend Garry shares out some of his father's home-brewed beer and makes everyone sick. Meanwhile, Barry and Erica want a new CD player, but Murray tells them he will only buy one for them if they write the greatest song ever.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly discovers Adam is failing in Spanish class, and immediately blames his teacher. However, when she arranges for him to receive extra tuition, her plan backfires.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Howard face problems when they file for a patent for their infinite persistence gyroscope. Plus, Penny, Amy and Bernadette give Raj dating advice when Emily reaches out to him after their breakup. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is shocked at a revelation from Sheldon after she buys him a new laptop, while Raj sells out Leonard and Howard after they lie to their wives in order to attend an early screening of a movie. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Man with a Plan

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt and Peralta investigate when three valuable antique coins are stolen from the university where Kevin works as a lecturer. Meanwhile, back at the precinct, Jeffords and Santiago get competitive about taking the squad out for lunch.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt deals with a personal loss. Jake must decide whether to take Terry or Charles to an exclusive event.(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The gang goes on the infamous sociology and geography field trip to Swanage, during which Neil tries his hardest to avoid the advances of over-friendly teacher Mr Kennedy. programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is unhappy about being forced by Mr Gilbert to take a work experience job at a garage due to a mix-up that sees Neil joining a newspaper. Meanwhile, Jay sorts out a placement for himself and Simon at his father's plant hire company. Starring Simon Bird and Blake Harrison.(n)

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Erin and the rest of the gang are excited to attend an outdoor pursuits weekend which aims to bring Protestant and Catholic school kids together as part of a peace initiative.(n)

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.sub-title: Ms De Brún and the Child of Prague
programme.desc: New English teacher Ms De Brún (Judith Roddy) arrives at Our Lady Immaculate and the friends immediately find themselves inspired. Comedy from writer Lisa McGee, set against the Troubles in early-1990s Northern Ireland, starring Tommy Tiernan, Tara Lynne O'Neill and Siobhan McSweeney.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted and Marshall are keen to make Barney's stag night one to remember, so they decide to kidnap him and take him to a secret party location. Guest starring Frances Conroy.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin tries to find her 'something old', which she buried in Central Park years previously in preparation for her potential future wedding. Meanwhile, Marshall and Lily ask Ted to help them pack for their trip to Italy, and Barney bonds with Robin's father.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Elena faces being deported, so Joe offers to marry her so she can stay in the country. Mel refuses to take part in the scheme, but when things begin to go wrong she is forced to protect the couple. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Comic-book store owner Stuart asks Amy out on a date, forcing a jealous Sheldon to consider the future of his relationship with her. programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray orders the cluttered garage be cleared out, although he insists on keeping one trunk that he is particularly sentimental about. Adam and Barry tease Erica mercilessly after discovering her old collection of New Kids on the Block memorabilia.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.desc: Diaz and Santiago team up to take down a ruthless killer who has managed to elude them for seven years. Jeffords helps Peralta to tackle the chores on his wedding planning list. Captain Holt and his rival Olivia Crawford try to convince each other to step down from the campaign to become Police Commissioner.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad springs into action when Jake and Amy's wedding is jeopardised by a major threat. Holt is reluctant to open the email saying whether he has been appointed Commissioner.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is driven to distraction when a tune becomes stuck in his head, while Amy and Dave arrange another date and Howard and Raj discover their band has a fan, but tracking him down turns out to be a mistake. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Mayim Bialik, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After more than five years of dating, Sheldon and Amy spend their first night together, while Leonard, Howard and Raj must decide who will take their extra Star Wars movie ticket. Plus, Sheldon's Obi-Wan advises him on his difficult relationship decisions. Starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with recurring guest star Bob Newhart.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel tries to gain votes by co-hosting a local TV show with Joe, and their on-camera bickering makes them an instant hit. But their popularity begins to have an effect on Lennox and Ryder, so they must decide on whether fame or family is more important. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel's new boyfriend Noah temporarily moves in to her apartment while his is being renovated, and Lennox starts a dream internship at a local newspaper - but struggles to wake up in time for work.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben enlists Riley's help to prove to the bar's owner that he is responsible enough to fill the new manager's job, but his tactic of posing as a family man soon backfires. Bonnie buys baby Emma a very girly pushchair, but Tucker and Danny exchange it for one they believe to be much cooler in the hope of attracting the attention of women.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.sub-title: Take Her Out of the Ballgame
programme.desc: Riley stands in as captain of softball league team after they keep losing, but her competitive side soon takes over and she starts taking the role too seriously, while Danny finds out that Bonnie is dating his hockey coach.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta helps Santiago to navigate the complicated relationship that she has with her brother David. Boyle introduces some drama into an undercover mission involving Jeffords and Captain Holt.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A visitor from Latvia causes Charles and Jake to investigate Nikolaj's family. Holt and Amy bring in famed forensic scientist Dr Yee to help close a case for Rosa.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As the 1984 presidential election approaches, Erica discovers that Beverly always just votes for the same candidate as Murray, and she sets out to educate her mother. Barry wants to appear on a sporty game show to prove his athletic prowess to his friends.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray seems keen when Adam announces he wants to take up a new activity at school - until he discovers it is fencing. Beverly tries her hand at matchmaking. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: On a weekend cabin trip with Penny and Amy, Sheldon spills one of Leonard's secrets, while Howard and Bernadette must draw a line when Raj goes overboard with pregnancy gifts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon disagree over whether to continue holding their regular Roommate Agreement meetings, with Leonard suggesting they are no longer required, while Sheldon believes they are still essential. As the pair's squabble quickly escalates into a full-blown argument, the rest of their friends turn up for a planned Game of Thrones viewing party, and end up taking sides in the dispute - resulting in two warring factions taking up residence in 4A and 4B. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Former Hollyoaks star Jorgie Porter presents a look back at some of the soap's most memorable weddings. Shane kidnaps Prince on his wedding day.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Jorgie Porter presents a look back at the build-up to Mercedes' fourth trip down the aisle, to marry Dr Browning, where a fight with Lindsey threatens to put a halt to proceedings.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam turns to the cool new guidance counsellor for advice. Meanwhile, Erica and Geoff try to hide the fact that they are living together.(n)

programme.title: Schooled
programme.desc: Principal Glascott and Lainey struggle to agree on what is an appropriate dress code. Elsewhere, Coach Mellor struggles with his relationship with Julie.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Nicole Appleton, Mel Blatt, Shaun Ryder, Bez, Chris Kamara, Example, Professor Green, Rylan Clark-Neal, Denise van Outen, Oti Mabuse, Chris Eubank Sr, Chris Eubank Jr, Martin and Roman Kemp, Gyles Brandreth, Sheila Hancock, Stanley Johnson, Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Emily Atack, Kate Robbins and Nick Grimshaw appraise TV shows including The Silence of the Lambs, The Andrew Neil Interviews with Jeremy Hunt and Boris Johnson, Killing Eve, Naked Attraction, The £100k Drop, First Dates and Serengeti.(n)

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist
programme.desc: Zoey surprisingly finds herself getting into major conflict with Simon, Max, Mo and even Howie. Meanwhile, Mitch and Maggie try to celebrate their anniversary.(n)
